title: VDE Headcount by Grade and Calendar Year (CTHRU-derived)
description: Annual Vocational Disability Examiner (VDE) headcount by pay grade, aggregated from Massachusetts CTHRU public payroll (MRC; title ILIKE '%DISAB EXAMINER%'). Covers calendar years 2010–2023. The grade scheme changed in 2016 from alpha (A/B, C, D) to roman-numeral (I, II, III, IV). Headline trend: VDE total fell from 232 (2019) to 129 (2023); Grade III collapsed from 44 to 7 over the same period.
unit_of_observation: VDE pay grade within DDS-Det (MassAbility/MRC), one grade-breakdown record per calendar year

columns.name: A_B
columns.description: VDE Grade A/B (entry, pre-2016); null under the roman scheme.

columns.name: C
columns.description: VDE Grade C (mid, pre-2016); null under the roman scheme.

columns.name: D
columns.description: VDE Grade D (senior, pre-2016); null under the roman scheme.

columns.name: I
columns.description: VDE Grade I (entry, post-2016); null under the alpha scheme.

columns.name: II
columns.description: VDE Grade II (mid, post-2016); null under the alpha scheme.

columns.name: III
columns.description: VDE Grade III (senior, post-2016); null under the alpha scheme.

columns.name: IV
columns.description: VDE Grade IV (specialist/lead, post-2016, first seen 2019); null earlier.

columns.name: total
columns.description: Total VDE headcount for the year. For 2016 the source provides total_raw (385, inflated) and total_corrected_estimate (~200) — use the corrected estimate.

notes: CONSUMPTION HAZARD: 2016 row carries both old and new grade columns (mid-year reclassification); raw total 385 is inflated, corrected ~200. Aggregated from CTHRU (dataset rxhc-k6iz) by the repo maintainer; counts payroll records per year (may differ from SSA SAOR FTE-authorized counts). CY2024 not yet in CTHRU as of 2026-05.
